title: agrostis basalis
intro: Agrostis basalis, commonly known as bent or a type of grass, is a plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Agrostis basalis include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing irritated airways. Herbal preparations of Agrostis basalis can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
